blocks.text: This is a demo session. In the real dashboard, this pane shows the live JSONL transcript of the selected Claude / Codex / Gemini session as it happens.

Right — I'll walk through the plan first, then implement. The demo doesn't actually run anything; it's a static snapshot of the dashboard's chrome and a hand-written conversation fixture so you can see the layout.
Done. New `/healthz` route returns `{ok: true, sha: <BUILD_SHA>}`. Tests pass. Install CCC locally to drive your own sessions through this dashboard.
